tweets.text:
Patiala House Court pressure ke baad Kaddu 🐾 मिली, JK contractor settlement ke पास से।
Brownie अब भी लापता है।
@DelhiAirport @DelhiPolice
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://x.com/i/status/2055863484500607392

News report के अनुसार Kaddu को Shahdara (Mohammadpur) में Contractor के घर के पास पाया गया।
अब Brownie कहाँ है?
@DelhiAirport @GmrAerocity
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://www.hindustantimes.com/cities/delhi-news/court-orders-fresh-probe-into-missing-dogs-outside-delhi-airport-101777659139322-amp.html

Airport ATR report ने vehicle details तक confirm कीं।
Same vehicle में Kaddu & Brownie को ले जाए जाने का आरोप।
@DelhiAirport @AAI_Official
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://x.com/i/status/2055863484500607392

Court ने साफ कहा:
जांच प्रभावित हुई तो IPC 223 के तहत कार्रवाई होगी।
फिर भी Brownie अब तक missing है।
@DelhiPolice @LtGovDelhi
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://www.ptinews.com/story/national/delhi-court-orders-joint-commissioner-to-probe-missing-stray-dogs-case-at-igia/3622654

News article बताता है:
Airport dogs के खिलाफ लगातार Fake शिकायतों का pattern बना हुआ था।
यह isolated घटना नहीं लगती।
@DelhiAirport @DelhiPolice
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://theprint.in/india/delhi-court-orders-joint-commissioner-to-probe-missing-stray-dogs-case-at-igia/2919729/

September 2025 में starving dogs की मौत,
February 2026 में dogs cages बंधे में मिले,
अब Kaddu-Brownie disappearance
Pattern alarming है।
@DelhiAirport @MCD_Delhi
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://x.com/i/status/2055863484500607392

MCD employees allegedly admitted complaints against Kaddu & Brownie were exaggerated.
False fear cannot justify relocation.
@MCD_Delhi @DelhiPolice
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://x.com/i/status/2055863484500607392

Court ne DIAL aur contractors की non-cooperation पर गंभीर चिंता जताई।
अब accountability तय होनी चाहिए।
@DelhiAirport @GmrAerocity
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://www.barandbench.com/news/no-serious-effort-made-by-police-to-trace-2-stray-dogs-missing-from-igi-airport-delhi-court

Kaddu recovery proves one thing:
Dogs vanished due to human action, not naturally
Brownie deserves same effort.
@DelhiAirport @DelhiPolice
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://x.com/i/status/2055863484500607392

Animal lovers had announced ₹50,000 reward to trace Kaddu & Brownie.
Citizens searched harder than authorities
@DelhiAirport @AAI_Official
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://www.inkl.com/news/delhi-court-orders-fresh-probe-into-missing-dogs-case-at-igi-airport

Without judicial intervention, truth may never emerge.
@DelhiAirport @DelhiPolice
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://x.com/i/status/2055863484500607392

Airport dogs were sterilised & vaccinated community animals
ABC Rules protect them from illegal relocation.
@MCD_Delhi @LtGovDelhi
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://www.hindustantimes.com/cities/delhi-news/court-orders-fresh-probe-into-missing-dogs-outside-delhi-airport-101777659139322-amp.html

This directly violates ABC Rules 2023
@DelhiAirport @DelhiPolice
#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation

Why?

#BringBackBrownie #StopRelocation
https://www.ptinews.com/story/national/delhi-court-orders-joint-commissioner-to-probe-missing-stray-dogs-case-at-igia/3622654
